• Architected and deployed scalable AWS infrastructure, managing EC2 instances and Redshift data warehousing for processing millions of data samples for ML applications.

  • Led end-to-end security testing initiatives covering critical vulnerabilities including SQL injection, XSS, IDOR, and session management, implementing robust validation protocols that strengthened application security posture.
  • Executed advanced security assessments focusing on SSRF, CSRF, and rate-limiting vulnerabilities, resulting in the successful implementation of enhanced security measures.
